purpose: Separate thesis-native physics from disclosed researcher extensions before any numerical contract is allowed to enter the pre-learner gate.

interventions.operational_interpretation: Choose which nonfungible ration type uses the next shared Op5-Op7 batch.
interventions.source_justification: The thesis names 21 ration types and models one Cold Weather ration, but provides only that product's BOM and no shared-line product-mix rules.
interventions.units_and_conservation: integer batches; ration units; ingredient units by BOM; line-hours; setup-hours or lost yield; payload weight and volume; no label may create material or capacity
interventions.null_or_falsification_regime: one homogeneous product, or equal-BOM fully fungible labels with zero setup, gives H_PI=H_obs=0
interventions.claim_limit: At most product-mix control in a Garrido-approved extension; not a result for the thesis single-product DES.

interventions.operational_interpretation: Book future shared lift for Op10 or Op12 before a route-specific degraded period.
interventions.source_justification: The thesis contains transport stages and risk editing, but assumes vehicle and route availability and does not specify a finite shared booking pool.
interventions.units_and_conservation: booked slots; vehicle-hours; payload; departures; cancellations and unused slots; capacity is removed from all competing arcs when committed
interventions.plausible_envelope_status: booking lead, fleet size, dwell and signal envelope absent
interventions.null_or_falsification_regime: unlimited 24-hour arcs or no pre-booking authority make the action transition-dead and H_PI=H_obs=0
interventions.claim_limit: Only advance transport reservation under validated fleet physics, not generic routing superiority.

interventions.operational_interpretation: Spend a scarce reporting resource to estimate unmet field demand before a binding replenishment or production decision.
interventions.source_justification: Lost-sales and censored-demand theory supplies the mechanism, but the current DES records requested orders and contains no report-acquisition action.
interventions.units_and_conservation: requested, issued, censored and lost ration units remain separate; reports consume named staff-hours or communication slots; evaluator retains sealed true demand
interventions.null_or_falsification_regime: if complete requested demand is recorded, active report acquisition has zero information value
interventions.claim_limit: Only value of a validated field-report process; never value from hiding demand already available to operators.

interventions.operational_interpretation: Move conserved stock between CSSUs after central dispatch commitments reveal a donor-recipient imbalance.
interventions.source_justification: Multiple CSSUs exist, but the thesis does not document lateral resupply authority, its routes or a distinct vehicle resource.
interventions.units_and_conservation: ration units at origin, in transit and destination; trips; payload; vehicle-hours; no unit may exist at two nodes simultaneously
interventions.plausible_envelope_status: lateral lane and distinct resource not established
interventions.null_or_falsification_regime: central resupply weakly dominates when lateral travel is no faster, uses the same lift and SB stock is available
interventions.claim_limit: Only lateral balancing where the real lane and resource distinction are validated.

interventions.operational_interpretation: Delay reports without adding a new physical commitment right.
interventions.source_justification: The proposal is a strict information reduction of Program G/H rather than a new physical mechanism.
interventions.units_and_conservation: unchanged inventory, pipeline, dispatch and capacity ledgers
interventions.plausible_envelope_status: mathematically defined but cannot create value by information inclusion alone
interventions.null_or_falsification_regime: O_lag is a subset of O_current with the same actions and transitions
interventions.claim_limit: No adaptive-headroom claim unless a separately validated irrevocable upstream decision is added.

interventions.operational_interpretation: Admit, defer, reroute or prioritize orders that have observable mission deadlines.
interventions.source_justification: The thesis permits backlog and priority logic but does not establish physical abandonment, admission authority or deadline classes.
interventions.units_and_conservation: orders and ration units; service-hours; every rejection or expiry remains a lost order in the canonical evaluator
interventions.null_or_falsification_regime: without physical expiry and released capacity it reduces to closed D1 priority control or prohibited demand shedding
interventions.claim_limit: Only deadline-aware admission under a lost-order non-inferiority guardrail.

interventions.operational_interpretation: Allocate a finite preventive-maintenance crew to the station whose observed condition indicates impending failure.
interventions.source_justification: Program J implements this researcher extension against thesis Op5-Op7 maintenance context.
interventions.units_and_conservation: crew-hours by station and week; downtime-hours; production units; one crew-hour cannot serve multiple stations
interventions.plausible_envelope_status: implemented screen; observed restricted-oracle maximum 0.0001338324 ReT
interventions.null_or_falsification_regime: signal removal or nonbinding crew makes adaptive allocation value zero
interventions.claim_limit: Current contract is closed below the 0.01 practical gate; severity or signal retuning alone cannot reopen it.

interventions.operational_interpretation: Dispatch a finite Maintenance Battalion team among operations disabled concurrently by one R21 or R3 event.
interventions.source_justification: The thesis names MaB and simultaneous R21/R3 operation outages, but its executable recovery clocks are independent and no scarce team pool, travel, repair-work or damage-assessment decision is specified.
interventions.units_and_conservation: team-hours and travel-hours; disabled-operation repair work in hours; one team cannot occupy two repairs; outage/recovery events remain on the exogenous tape and policy choices change consequences only
interventions.plausible_envelope_status: current parallel-recovery action is exact-null; scarce-team parameter envelope unavailable
interventions.null_or_falsification_regime: thesis-default independent parallel recovery clocks, or teams at least equal disabled sites, makes the proposed sequencing action nonbinding
interventions.claim_limit: Do not call the family falsified or executable until team scarcity, repair-work meaning, travel, preemption and damage-observation timing are supplied; then begin with exact DP/permutation comparators before any learner.

interventions.operational_interpretation: Reserve, relocate or reconfigure scarce storage across products or locations before arrivals.
interventions.source_justification: The thesis explicitly assumes unlimited storage, so finite space is not thesis-native physics.
interventions.units_and_conservation: volume-time; inventory volume by location; handling-hours; relocation transport; overflow units remain explicitly located or lost
interventions.plausible_envelope_status: site capacities and overflow consequences absent
interventions.claim_limit: Only storage-allocation value under measured capacity and handling constraints.

interventions.operational_interpretation: Trade Op7 inspection effort against immediate throughput and later defect/rework consequences.
interventions.source_justification: Op7 quality control and R14 Binomial defects with Op6 rework are thesis-native. Controllable inspection intensity, diagnostic accuracy, lot persistence/signals and escaped-defect consequences are not specified.
interventions.units_and_conservation: inspection-minutes; line-hours; CRN-coupled exogenous per-unit/lot latent draws; latent defective = inspected TP + inspected FN + uninspected defective; latent conforming = inspected TN + inspected FP + uninspected conforming; escaped defective = inspected FN + uninspected defective; inspected TP + inspected FP = reworked + scrapped + held/queued; only qualified/reworked output may satisfy orders; R14 attribution cannot depend on detection action
interventions.plausible_envelope_status: action, effort-response curve, persistent quality regime, leading signal and escape endpoint absent; current-kernel H_PI=H_obs=0
interventions.null_or_falsification_regime: current no-inspection-action kernel gives exact H_PI=H_obs=0. For an introduced action, effort-invariant detection, qualification, rework/escape and throughput responses make it transition-dead. Constant-p/no-quality-signal blocks the proposed signal-responsive mechanism but does not exclude backlog/cover feedback; zero escape consequence can make intensive inspection dominated without making it transition-dead
interventions.claim_limit: Only adaptive quality-control effort with qualified-delivery guardrails.

interventions.operational_interpretation: Choose land, air or water mode and destination before dispatch, tying up a mode-specific asset through turnaround.
interventions.source_justification: The thesis mentions transport modes and urgency, but models a common 24-hour arc and assumes vehicle availability.
interventions.units_and_conservation: mode-specific vehicle or aircraft-hours; payload; trips; turnaround; an asset cannot serve concurrent dispatches
interventions.plausible_envelope_status: mode capacities, leads, eligibility and risk exposure absent
interventions.null_or_falsification_regime: collapsing every mode to the same unlimited 24-hour arc gives H_PI=H_obs=0
interventions.claim_limit: Only mode-selection value under validated fleet, payload, lead and availability facts.

interventions.operational_interpretation: Choose between a primary and alternate route for the same shipment before committing one finite vehicle through its return leg.
interventions.source_justification: The thesis contains Op8 transport and R22 but takes route planning and vehicle availability as given; the alternate route and its warning process are researcher-introduced.
interventions.units_and_conservation: ration payload, departures, outbound and return vehicle-hours, route-specific delay and in-transit stock; one vehicle and shipment cannot occupy both routes
interventions.plausible_envelope_status: implemented as a development scaffold but route, fleet, persistence and signal parameters are not validated; the v1 screen is not a certified PI bound
interventions.null_or_falsification_regime: the thesis-native one-route kernel, common-mode route effects, identical route physics or post-departure warning gives H_PI=H_obs=0
interventions.claim_limit: Only alternate-route recourse after Garrido face validation and a complete resource-restricted bound; the present heuristic null neither confirms Paper 2 nor closes the introduced family.

interventions.operational_interpretation: Commit one team among plant maintenance, line-of-communication recovery and theatre response.
interventions.source_justification: The post-K3 bottleneck simulator is a versioned extension; the thesis does not identify one real cross-stage team.
interventions.units_and_conservation: one 168-hour response-team week per epoch allocated mutually exclusively to M, T or R, totaling 4032 hours; all policies receive identical 10000-unit initial reserve/capacity/target and frozen issue/replenishment access; reserve issue, replenishment and request counts are endogenous outcome flows in v1 and must satisfy reserve-stock and whole-system mass conservation
interventions.plausible_envelope_status: numerically executable, but the real shared-resource identity is unvalidated and the exact frontier/PI ceiling is incomplete
interventions.null_or_falsification_regime: removing bottleneck coupling yielded exact selected-terminal-metric hashes on three retrospective tapes; a preregistered full-ledger null remains required
interventions.claim_limit: The v1 budget semantics are clarified but not domain-validated. No Paper 2 or domain claim until the full-horizon comparator, restricted-PI ceiling, Garrido confirmation of a fungible cross-stage team, and Garrido identification and componentwise matching of every separately finite reserve transport/handling resource all pass.

interventions.operational_interpretation: Allocate a fixed carried-ration loadout among mission cohorts before departure, after receiving mission and resupply plans.
interventions.source_justification: The thesis states that a ration covers 24 hours, weighs at most 1.4 kg, soldiers commonly carry about five, and mission duration/resupply frequency affect the number carried; the executable DES contains no personal-carry state or action.
interventions.units_and_conservation: ration packs and kilograms by cohort; packs leave CSSU inventory on issue, satisfy sealed timestamped demand only when consumed, and unused packs must be returned, transferred or explicitly written off
interventions.plausible_envelope_status: conceptually thesis-anchored but not parameterizable or executable from current sources
interventions.null_or_falsification_regime: identical mission distributions, fully reliable resupply, nonbinding carry limits or a shuffled/post-departure mission signal gives H_obs=0
interventions.claim_limit: At most mission-loadout allocation in a Garrido-approved downstream extension; not a result for the current theatre-delivery endpoint.

interventions.operational_interpretation: For one frozen finished-ration type with no output-product choice/substitution, prioritize named complementary raw-material components in a capacity-limited Op4 load or use a matched expedition resource before Op5 kit commitment.
interventions.source_justification: The thesis names 12 raw materials and models R13 over 12 deliveries, but the DES aggregates them and supplies no component-specific load authority or finite Op4 lift.
interventions.units_and_conservation: rm1...rm12 units; per-ration BOM; payload weight/volume; minimum lots; departures; vehicle-hours; expedition tokens; every component remains on-hand, in-transit, consumed or explicitly lost
interventions.plausible_envelope_status: component identities, BOM, pipeline visibility, finite mixed-load lift and expedition authority absent; current-kernel H_PI=H_obs=0
interventions.null_or_falsification_regime: common scalar R13 delay, proportional kits, nonbinding lift or fixed loads gives H_PI=H_obs=0. If named component identity exists but is unobserved before dispatch, only H_obs=0 follows; H_PI may remain positive.
interventions.claim_limit: Only component-kit balancing or expedition value under Garrido-validated component and Op4 physics.

interventions.operational_interpretation: After Op7 detects nonconforming output, choose hold/rework versus scrap-and-replace without ever shipping a known defect.
interventions.source_justification: The thesis requires return to Op6; the executable r14_defect_mode is a fidelity configuration, not a sequential decision. Discretionary disposition and its costs are absent.
interventions.units_and_conservation: defective ration units; rework line-hours and yield; replacement raw-material units and lead; qualified output; disposal; the original R14 event remains attributed through replacement
interventions.plausible_envelope_status: disposition authority and distinct rework/replacement parameters absent; current-kernel H_PI=H_obs=0 and rework weakly dominates discard
interventions.null_or_falsification_regime: mandatory unit-yield rework at the same effective line rate and no additional consequence gives a single dominant action
interventions.claim_limit: Only post-detection lot disposition under validated quality, capacity, material and attribution rules.

interventions.operational_interpretation: Satisfy an order with an approved alternative ration without erasing the original demand ledger.
interventions.source_justification: Twenty-one ration types are named, but no mission/climate substitution matrix or authority is documented.
interventions.units_and_conservation: original requested units; substituted units by type; nutritional/mission eligibility; unmet originals remain lost or backlogged
interventions.plausible_envelope_status: substitution matrix and accounting semantics absent
interventions.null_or_falsification_regime: cancellation or deferral that raises ReT by deleting demand fails the lost-order guardrail
interventions.claim_limit: No demand-shaping claim; only approved noninferior product substitution may be tested.
